# Ai Wiz Chat

> Ai Wiz Chat is a WhatsApp Business API platform for campaigns, automation flows, shared inbox conversations, CRM, templates, contact management, and external chat API integrations.

This file provides a concise map of public Ai Wiz Chat resources for AI agents and developer tools. Product pages describe user-facing features, while API and integration docs explain how external systems can connect safely.

## Public Site

- [Homepage](https://www.aiwizchat.com/): Product overview for WhatsApp campaigns, automation, inbox, CRM, and API access.
- [Features](https://www.aiwizchat.com/features): Product feature sections for campaigns, automation, CRM workflows, inbox, and analytics.
- [Pricing](https://www.aiwizchat.com/pricing): Plan and feature access information.
- [Help Center](https://www.aiwizchat.com/help-center): User guidance for setup, templates, campaigns, contacts, and integrations.

## Developer Resources

- [API Base URL](https://api.aiwizchat.com/): Production API origin for Ai Wiz Chat integrations.
- [API Health](https://api.aiwizchat.com/api/health): Backend health endpoint.
- [Documentation Raw Content](https://www.aiwizchat.com/docs/AIWIZCHAT_PUBLIC_DOCS_RAW.md): Raw public documentation source when hosted by the docs site.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.aiwizchat.com/privacy-policy): Platform privacy and data handling policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.aiwizchat.com/terms-of-service): Terms covering account, workspace, messaging, billing, and integration usage.
- [Data Deletion](https://www.aiwizchat.com/data-deletion): Instructions for requesting personal data deletion.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.aiwizchat.com/sitemap.xml): Indexable public URLs.
- [Robots](https://www.aiwizchat.com/robots.txt): Crawling policy.
